entry.title: SAP MDK - How do I filter items in a list of items?
entry.content:
Hello community! I'll tell you what I want to achieve. I have this list of "Areas" in a "Simple Property Collection"

Each area has a list of certain teams associated with it, these teams must be filtered by the ID of the Area entered, because each area has different teams (Equipos).

I have a navigation called "NavTo_Equipos.action"

This is my "Equipo" page, I thought it would automatically filter the teams according to their areas but it didn't.

For each area it shows me the same complete list of equipment. And this is wrong.

I also tried setting up this filter but it didn't work. This way it shows me absolutely nothing.

What am I doing wrong? I am attaching this just in case how the relationship was presented in my CAP service.

entity AREA : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    EMPRESA : Association to one EMPRESA;
    DESCRIPCION : String100;
    DESCRIPCIONCONCATENADA : String5000;
    AREANIVEL : Association to one AREANIVEL;
    CODIGOSAP : String;
    ACTIVOSAP : Boolean;
    EQUIPOS : Association to many EQUIPO on EQUIPOS.AREA = $self;
}

entity EQUIPO : cuid, AUDITORIA, ACTIVO {
    DESCRIPCION : String100;
    AREA : Association to one AREA;
    SECTOR : Association to one SECTOR;
    LIDER : Association to one PERSONA;
    COORDINADORCORPORATIVO : Association to one PERSONA;
    COORDINADORGENERAL : Association to one PERSONA;
}

Thanks for the help

entry.title: Re: How US External Tax tackle Cross-Border Transactions between US and Canada in S/4HANA Cloud 1911
entry.content:
Hi Amanda,

I have a query, 

Customer Sold to is of US

Ship to customer code is of Canada

In this scenario Customer billing from US should apply Canadian Tax. 

please let me know how this scenario can be mapped.

Thank you,

Anand

entry.title: Re: Libro de Remuneraciones Electrónico
entry.content:
Estimados

Les agradeceré si me pudiesen indicar si el empleado es pensionado por invalidez, en qué parte del sistema lo indico para que en el libro de remuneraciones si visualice en el campo Pensionado por Invalidez 1108.

 

Gracias.

entry.title: Re: Replicate and modify xml node using XSLT
entry.content:
How about

<xsl:stylesheet version="2.0"
	xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
	<xsl:output method="xml" omit-xml-declaration="yes" indent="yes"/>
	<xsl:template match="@* | node()" mode="#all">
		<xsl:copy>
			<xsl:apply-templates select="@* | node()" mode="#current"/>
		</xsl:copy>
	</xsl:template>
	<xsl:template match="RETAILLINEITEM/item">
		<xsl:copy-of select="."/>
		<xsl:copy>
			<xsl:apply-templates select="@*|node()"/>
		</xsl:copy>
	</xsl:template>
	<xsl:template match="RETAILLINEITEM/item/SALESAMOUNT" >
		<xsl:copy>
			<xsl:value-of select=". * -1"/>
		</xsl:copy>
	</xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

Regards,

Jamie

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue

entry.title: Re: Release Notes for SQL Anywhere 17.0 SP1 PL17 Build 7821 are not available
entry.content: Notes should be available near the time that patch is posted. It is a bit of a tangent from the the software post but is a manual step. I will follow-up with the colleagues how do that work. As Volker noted that release notes are included self extracting installer. Note that it not foolproof as we have had some occurrences where the read me was empty. I have address the root cause for that to occur but I do not want to assume it is in fact corrected.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest sessions timezone - Accomodating EST
entry.content:
Everything is available on YouTube.  Replays are available as soon as the live session starts.  Even if you join a few minutes late you can watch from the replay instead of the live if you want. It's all the same URL/Link as the live session, which makes it very easy on everyone. 

About 90% of the Devtoberfest views happen on the replay not the live. So, you aren't alone in that regard.  We tend to schedule around speaker availability knowing how the high the replay viewers are anyway.  You even get the chat replayed as it happened live. You just can't ask questions in real time.  But you can always post questions in the comments of the view on YouTube or return here to the discussion groups to ask questions after the fact.

entry.title: LOCATE Original User - Table BKPF: USNAM = SAP_WFRT and TCODE = MIRO
entry.content:
I need to create a report to provide AP performance, however most of the AP Invoice transactions is done by Workflow/Batch processing how do i find the original user to determine performance? 

I am using table BKPF but the only USNAM i find for Transaction TYPE KR is the workflow.

entry.title: Re: Golden Arrow In Query
entry.content: I use the DocEntry and name the column Sales Order Key or Delivery Key and instruct the users that they can click on that Golden Arrow to access the document.

entry.title: How to obtain SuggestedItem in a SAPUI5 SearchField?
entry.content:
Hello everyone!! I need to get the SuggestedItem selected by a user within a SearchField, but specifically, I need to get the key associated with the SuggestedItem selected by the user. Here is the code for my view:

<SearchField
											enableSuggestions="true"
											enabled="true"
											placeholder=""
											showRefreshButton="false"
											showSearchButton="true"
											suggestionItems="{path: '/ExampleSet'}" 
											suggest=".onSuggest"
											value=""
											visible="true"
											width="auto"
											tooltip="Buscar empleado"
											id="searchField"
											change="onSeleccionado"
											suggestionItemSelected="suggestionItemSelected"
										>
											<suggestionItems>
												<SuggestionItem text="{Sname}" key="{Pernr}" description="      {Pernr}"/>
											</suggestionItems>

 I tried with suggestionItemSelected but the event is not triggered. How can I get the key of the SuggestionItem?

entry.title: Re: Error When execute API : Cannot connect to host zeus....
entry.content:
It seems that the Backend Service used in the tutorial:

https://refapp-espm-ui-cf.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/espm-cloud-web/espm.svc/Products

isn't working anymore. I've worked through the tutorial last week and it was working fine. But now the error message indicates that there is some issue with the HANA Database. I would suggest that you use the Feedback --> Contribute option in the tutorial to file an Issue in the Tutorial GitHub repository. That is better tracked than the forums by the responsible SAP employees.

Regards,
Sathish Kumar BP

entry.title: EWM Bin to Bin Transfer with Product details and Handling unit
entry.content:
Storage Bin:

In SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM), a storage bin is a specific location within a warehouse where inventory items are stored. These bins are used to manage and organize goods efficiently within the warehouse.

 

Source Bin:

Source bin refers to the storage location from which goods are being moved or picked. It is essentially the origin point in warehouse operations where inventory is currently stored before it is either transferred to another location or used for order fulfillment.

 

Destination Bin:

A destination bin refers to the storage location within the warehouse where goods are to be moved or placed. It is the end point in warehouse operations for the placement or transfer of inventory.

 

Stock Type:

Stock type refers to the classification of inventory based on its status or condition within the warehouse. Stock types help manage and differentiate various categories of stock to streamline warehouse operations, ensure accurate inventory management, and comply with business and regulatory requirements.

 

Handling Unit:

HU represents a physical or logical unit used to manage and track goods during warehouse operations. It is a critical concept for organizing, handling, and shipping inventory efficiently. Handling units are used to group individual items together into a single unit for easier management throughout the warehouse processes.

 

Warehouse Task:

Warehouse Task is a fundamental element of warehouse operations that represents a specific action or set of actions to be performed within the warehouse. Warehouse tasks are used to manage and direct various warehouse activities, such as picking, putaway, and inventory handling.

 

Warehouse Process Type:

It is a configuration element that defines and controls the various processes and activities that occur within the warehouse. Warehouse process types are used to determine how different types of warehouse operations are handled, including the rules and procedures for specific processes.

 

1) EWM BIN TO BIN MOVEMENT WITH PRODUCT DETAILS:

Step1: Enter transaction code /SCWM/ADPROD

 

 

 

Step2: Product search

Enter the Product number and click execute

Select the form view this will expand the details of the product and allow you to input you new location details

 

Step3: Advanced Product search

To narrow down the search, open advanced search and enter the batch number and click advanced search.

When the search is complete, close advanced search.

 

Step4: Enter the Product Details

Enter the Qty you wish to move

Scan your destination bin

Enter the Whse Proc. Type 9999

If you wish to confirm the task at this stage tick the Confirm WT

 

 

Step5: Create and Save

If all details are correct, you can click Create + save

 

 

2) EWM BIN TO BIN MOVEMENT HANDLING UNIT:

Step1: Bin to Bin movement with Handling unit

Enter transaction code /SCWM/ADHU

 

Step2: Handling unit number

Enter the HU number and click execute

Select the form view this will expand the details of the HU and allow you to input you new location details

 

Step3: Enter HU details

Scan your HU into the destination HU

Scan your destination bin

Enter the Whse Proc. Type 9999

If you wish to confirm the task at this stage tick the Confirm WT       

If all details are correct, you can click Confirm + save

 

 

Step4: Create and Save

 

 

Conclusion:

Steps to perform EWM Bin to Bin Transfer with Product Details and Handling Unit are provided.

entry.title: Create delivery from salesorder in SAP B1 service layer API for partial DocumentAdditionalExpenses
entry.content:
Hi,
 
I am creating a delivery from a sales order using the SAP B1 service layer API, incorporating partial line-item details as well as partial DocumentLineAdditionalExpenses and DocumentAdditionalExpenses in the initial delivery note by retrieving data from the sales order get API.
 
However, when attempting to create a second delivery note using the remaining line items along with the pending DocumentLineAdditionalExpenses and DocumentAdditionalExpenses, I am unable to retrieve the utilized expenses from the sales order.
 
Could you please suggest a method to verify the utilized expense details from the sales order using SAP B1 service layer?

entry.title: Re: How to auto create Invididual QM order for inspection lot?
entry.content:
Hi Sally

You need to create the QM Order in T-Code QK01 where you select 1) where the QM order should be settled, and 2) the material and inspection type from which the cost should be collected.

 

BR

Erik

entry.title: Re: Replicate and modify xml node using XSLT
entry.content: Thanks Jamie - How does xsl know that is has to only change the copied amount by *-1 and not the 1st original amount?

entry.title: Goods Issue Reversal, Cancel Picking and Outbound Delivery Zero Out Quantity
entry.content:
Outbound delivery:

Outbound delivery is a document that represents the process of shipping goods from the warehouse to a customer or another location. It is a crucial component of the order fulfillment process, detailing the items to be shipped, their quantities, and their destinations.

Goods Issue:

It is an essential process that represents the physical removal of goods from the warehouse inventory. It is a crucial step in various warehouse and logistics processes, including outbound deliveries, internal movements, and inventory management. The goods issue process updates inventory records to reflect the fact that items have been dispatched or otherwise removed from storage.

 

Goods Issue Reversal:

Goods Issue Reversal is the process of undoing a previously posted goods issue. This action is used to correct errors or to adjust inventory records when goods that were mistakenly removed or shipped need to be returned to the warehouse or accounted for differently.

 

Picking:

It refers to the process of retrieving items from storage locations within the warehouse to fulfill customer orders or other requirements. Picking is a crucial part of warehouse operations and directly affects the efficiency and accuracy of order fulfillment.

 

Cancel Picking:

Cancel picking refers to the process of undoing or reversing a picking action that was previously recorded. This action is necessary when an error occurs during the picking process, such as picking the wrong items or quantities, or when a picking task needs to be retracted for other reasons.


Steps to perform Goods Issue Reversal, Cancel Picking and Outbound Delivery Zero Out Quantity:

Step1: Display Outbound delivery using transaction code /SCWM/PRDO

 

Step2: Navigate to the Goods issue option and select the Reverse goods issue option from the drop down menu

 

Reverse goods issue is completed.

Then click on the Outbound delivery option and delete the ODO and save.

 

 

Step3: Cancellation of picking using the transaction code /N/SCWM/CANCPICK

In the find option select the Document number and provide the outbound delivery number.

Select the document number line and then select the “Release Stock + WT in foreground”.

Click on the form view

In the next screen provide the following details

  1. a) Quantity
  2. b) Destination bin 
  3. c) Warehouse process type

Check mark the option Confirm WT and then click on create and save.

 

The warehouse order is created.

 

Step4: Confirm the warehouse order using the transaction code /N/SCWM/TO_CONF

Provide the warehouse order number and then click on Confirm+Save option.

 

Step5: Display the Outbound delivery using the transaction code /N/SCWM/PRDO

 

Navigate to the Process code option and then select the option “Adjust Delivery Quantity” from the drop-down option.

 

Select the Process code “O001”

 

The quantity is changed to Zero.

 

Then click on the Create outbound delivery option.

 

 

Conclusion:

Goods Issue Reversal, Cancel Picking and Outbound Delivery Zero Out Quantity provided.

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am from Germany and currently living in Saarbrücken (Saarland), which is the capital of one of the sixteen German states located in the west.

I've just started studying Business Informatics, aiming for a top-tier Bachelor's degree. I'm passionate about learning, sharing knowledge, and engaging with others. My focus is on gaining expertise in SAP and becoming a speaker on AI and IT. I believe in the power of technology and business to shape the future.

I’m sharing my learning journey here to inspire and connect with others.

My tip for anyone reading this: Stay curious and never stop learning.

 

Kind regards,

Jerry

entry.title: 🟡 Spooktoberfest 2024
entry.content:
It’s quite the spooky time of year so let’s share pictures of spooky tech things!

All Devtoberfest Week 4, you’ll be able to share pictures or stories of spooky tech related things you’ve experienced or know of. You can also take a picture of spooky decor in your office or your Halloween costume. 

The Friday before Week 2, there will be a link in this event to the discussion post where pictures should be shared. Check back then for the link!

As this is just an event page, comments here may not be counted to your Devtoberfest point total so be sure you’re in the right place before posting the pictures.

entry.title: Re: How can I create smart forms/ Labels in S4HANA Public...
entry.content:
Hello @gowthamigunji2000 !

You can add new fields to your Custom Form Template by creating Custom fields. To fill your custom field with a value you can create a Custom Logic or enable it to manual change.

Find more information here: How to Extend a Custom Form Template with Custom Fields | SAP Help Portal

Kind regards,
Luiza

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: My name is Patience , I was born in a small farming area in Makonde Zimbabwe . I am so passionate about technology . I have a Certificate in Computer Studies  ,  Diploma in Information Technology and Bachelor of Science in Computing . I however work as a receptionist in a  salon and its sad that I can not utilise my education . SAP is a scarce and expensive skill that is out of reach for a lot  of people which will give me an edge above other competitors especially in Car Manufacturing companies in South Africa .

entry.title: Re: ¿Qué pasa en Soporte SAP Business One?
entry.content:
Hola a todos

Al entrar a esta publicación pensé que iba a obtener respuesta clara sobre el soporte que le dará SAP a B1 en el futuro, pero realmente no responden la pregunta ¿Qué pasa con el soporte de SAP Business One?. Mi interés concreto es saber si desde la casa matriz se seguirá dando soporte a las siguientes versiones que salgan de Business One en el futuro, pues hay mucha incertidumbre para aquellas empresas PYME que queremos hacer una inversión en este ERP o que actualmente tienen SAP B1, pero con las diferentes publicaciones que rondan en internet no hay claridad del futuro de esta solución.

Espero puedan aclarar mi duda. Gracias

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM RF with Screen Personas - Viewpoint functiona...
entry.content: We have released note 3517231 to correct the reported problem.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Product compliance - Safety Data Sheet creat...
entry.content:
Hi Shashi,

let me precise the steps for a hybrid approach for SDS:

1. Basic product data is maintained in product compliance module on compliance view / "CCI" (composition, purpose, ...) and used for product marketability, dangerous goods and / or SDS management and shipment

2. SDS data including phrases is maintained in the classic solution --> basic compliance data needs to be synchronized between the two solutions (CCI, composition ...)

3. Use WWI for SDS design based on the data from the classic solution. If you use dangerous goods (DG) in the new solution, use the available public API to read the DG data from the new solution. 

4. Upload the raw report / base SDS with compliance data (RTF format) to SDS assessments in the product compliance module via public API

5. During the SDS shipment use the BAdI to call the final SDS generation of the classic solution. The final SDS additionally contains product and company data.

If you have a chance to join our annual SAP EHS & Product Compliance Infodays 2024 (virtually) on the 25 September (2nd day), you can get more information on the two available solutions that additionally support such a hybrid approach:

  1. 3E's S/4 Hybrid Adapter - Connecting the classic and new capabilities of SAP S/4 for product compliance, as part of ERC+
  2. Using new capabilities in SAP S/4HANA for product compliance, with support from the Product Compliance Sync Tool 

Best regards,
Saskia

entry.title: Mass activation of OData Services and ICF services
entry.content:
How to activate millions of ICF services and OData services (Mass activation)?.

A list of all active OData services can be exported from the source system via transaction /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE.

Right click on Services columns and chose spread sheet option

Click on Export to.. and provide local desktop path

 

Note: xlsx will be having all the columns.

Trim External services names columns and copy to .txt file as below

Now, let us see how to export SICF services

  • A list of all active ICF Nodes can be exported from the source system via program RS_ICF_SERV_ADMIN_TASKS  in excel sheet.

  • Se38 – report

  •  

    Select option based on your choice. In my case, exporting active services only and execute

  • Provide local desk path. Snippet of exported services looks as below.

  • This is a .csv file

    Now, let us see how to import them into target systems

    Login to target system and go to following task list (stc01)

     

    SAP_GATEWAY_ACTIVATE_ODATA_SERV

     

  • Copy exported Odata services here

    Chose processing mode and execute in background

  • Successfully imported active ODATA services.

    You can go back to /n/iwfnd/maint_service and verify.

  • Now, let us see to how to import exported sicf services

    Login to target system run program se38-  RS_ICF_SERV_MASS_PROCESSING

  • Execute and provide csv file as input (which was exported earlier) and execute.

    Go to t-code sicf  and verify activated nodes/services.

entry.title: Re: Duplicate "sap.app/id" Error in SAP Build Work Zone H...
entry.content: As Build Work Zone and the HTML5 repository are on the subaccount level and don't care about CF spaces I think the only solution is to create a QAS Subaccount and deploy the Apps there and setup also Build WZ there.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting 431 Status Code When Creating a SAMLA...
entry.content: Do you use the same XSUAA instance for backend and frontend?

entry.title: Re: Security structure in SAC
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud comes with several pre-configured standard roles that provide various levels of access. To create a custom role Navigate to Role Management: Go to System -> Security -> Roles in SAP Analytics Cloud. Once Role is created, assign the necessary permissions for Content Creation, Story Viewing, Modeling, Administration, Planning, and more.

Create similar matric for custom role.

Role Name Story View Story Edit Model View Model Edit Admin Functions Data Access

AdminYesYesYesYesYesFull
BI Content CreatorYesYesYesYesNoFull
BI Content ViewerYesNoYesNoNoLimited
Planning AdminYesYesYesYesNoFull
ViewerYesNoNoNoNoLimited

Factors to be considered

 

  • Granularity: Make sure to grant only the necessary permissions. Avoid giving more access than required to maintain security.
  • Segregation of Duties (SoD): Ensure that conflicting roles (e.g., the same user being able to create and approve content) are separated to avoid errors.
  • Data Access: Make sure that sensitive data is only visible to the users who need access to it. Implement row-level security if necessary.
  • Functional Permissions: Determine if users need to create, modify, or only view content, and tailor the permissions accordingly.

entry.title: How to get URL parameters in SAP Screen Personas
entry.content:
Greetings,

How do I access the URL parameters inside the Screen Personas flavor?

The goal is to call a flavor by the URL while including some additional values as parameters.

The parameters come back empty when using plain JavaScript, and I don't see any references to the URL parameters from any of the Screen Personas scripting objects.

Personas version 3.17

I saw this thread, but found no solution:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/how-to-access-browser-url-parameters-in-personas-flavor-script/qaq-p/12253052

Thank you

entry.title: SAP BTP SDK for iOS 24.8.0 is now available
entry.content:
Release announcement: SAP BTP SDK for iOS 24.8.0 can be downloaded

The new version of SAP BTP SDK for iOS 24.8.0 is now generally available.

You can download the latest version of the SDK either from the Software Center or the downloads section on develeopers.sap.com

With this latest release, the SAP BTP SDK for iOS team has brought some exciting new features for you to explore.

In this blog, we will highlight the new upgrade's offerings. Please visit our documentation and API reference to get a detailed overview of all the features released.

 

Highlights

 

visionOS App Development

In the previous release (24.4), we introduced the foundational capability to start developing for visionOS. With the 24.8 release, we've taken this further by expanding the. Now, you can leverage all the authentication types supported by SAP Mobile Services, ensuring seamless and secure logins for your users. This release also brings advanced security features such as App Attestation, and Clipboard restriction. Additionally, developers can now build visionOS apps that can run offline.

 

Assistant Improvements

With the latest release of SAP BTP SDK for iOS, the SAP BTP SDK Assistant has been enhanced to support the creation of applications using IAS (Identity Authentication Service) security settings. Previously, this option was available only on SAP Mobile Services. Now, you can directly configure IAS security settings in the Assistant, alongside the existing support for XSUAA.

The Assistant now fully supports Complex OData Types in the scaffolding applications it generates. Whether you're using the generated app as a reference or a starting point, it will handle OData services with complex types, simplifying the development of UIs based on complex data structures.

 

Foundation Enhancements

In this release, the Foundation framework has been enhanced to support Apple’s bytes API. This powerful addition enables you to retrieve the contents of a URL request as an asynchronous sequence of bytes. With this capability, you can now stream response data in real-time without needing to wait for the entire response to be fully downloaded.

Additionally, the latest version of the SDK introduces Secure Store APIs, allowing you to securely store sensitive information such as authentication tokens. This feature will accelerate your watchOS development, allowing you to store authentication context between your phone app and watch extension.

 

OData

By upgrading to the 24.8.0's OData Library, you can start using the $search & $filter OData queries for both online and offline apps. The offline apps are also capable of using OData open type and a single entity type for containment of multuple parent entity sets.

 

SAP Fiori

The 24.8 version includes several additions and enhancements to SAP Fiori & SAP Fiori Flows. You can now integrate third-party scanning solutions into the scanning flow. By introducing a list of scanning options, users can select from multiple available scanning solutions, with the added ability to search through these options.

The search bar has been improved to better handle various states involved in speech recognition, offering a more intuitive and seamless user experience when performing voice-based searches.

Additionally, starting with this release, you can register for a more detailed session that will cover all the new capabilities in depth. To join, register for the SAP Fiori for Android & iOS Release Rollout here.

 

Raise A Request

If you have feature ideas that the SDK should support, please raise an improvement request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279.

 

Feature Summary

This blog highlights some of the features released with the new version of SAP BTP SDK for iOS – 24.8.0. For details, please check the important links section.

  • visionOS Development Enhancements
  • IAS & Complex OData Types in Assistant Generated Apps
  • Stream Data from URLs using the Foundation Framework
  • Enhanced and New Fiori Horizon Controls like enabling 3rd party scanners

 

Important Links

  • SAP BTP SDK for iOS 24.8 Download (Software Center)
  • Documentation
  • API Reference

 

Acknowledgement

A huge kudos to the spectacular team that worked tirelessly, right from conceptualizing the improvements, to defining, designing, building, and eventually delivering them.

entry.title: SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.8.0 is now available
entry.content:
Release announcement: SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.8.0 can now be downloaded

The new version of SAP BTP SDK for Android – version 24.8.0 is now available.

You can download the latest version of the SDK either from the Software Center or the downloads section on develeopers.sap.com

The SAP BTP SDK for Android team brings some exciting new features to you with this new release.

In this blog, we will highlight some of the cool features that come with the new upgrade. To get a detailed overview of all the features released, please visit our user documentation and our API reference documentation.

 

Highlights

 

Wizard

With the 24.8 release, the SAP BTP SDK for Android Wizard now supports Android Studio Koala and Android Studio Jellyfish.

Additionally, the Wizard now allows the creation of applications using IAS (Identity Authentication Service) security settings, a feature previously available only on SAP Mobile Services. Developers can now select IAS security settings directly within the Wizard, alongside the existing support for XSUAA.

 

OData

By upgrading to the 24.8.0's OData Library, you can start using the $search & $filter OData queries for both online and offline apps. The offline apps are also capable of using OData open type and a single entity type for containment of multuple parent entity sets.

 

SAP Fiori

Jetpack Compose Controls

By using the 24.8 version, you can now use a Floating Action Button (FAB) using Jetpack Compose. Additionally, you can specify limits and display them in the attachment control.

XML-View Based Controls

You can now integrate third-party scanning solutions into the view based scanning control. Users can select from multiple available scanning solutions, with the added ability to search through these options. Similar to Jetpack Compose, you can define and display limits in the attachment control. You can also add helper text for FilterChip, Choice, DateTimePicker and DurationPicker form cell controls.

SAP Fiori Flows

The SDK now allows customization of the information presented during the sign-in flow. This is particularly useful in multi-user scenarios, where you might want to display customized fields, such as first names, instead of the default IDP-provided username.

SAP Fiori Rollout Session

Additionally, starting with this release, you can register for a more detailed session that will cover all the new capabilities in depth. To join, register for the SAP Fiori for Android & iOS Release Rollout here.

 

Raise A Request

If you have feature ideas that the SDK should support, please raise an improvement request here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2279.

 

Feature Summary

This blog highlights some of the features released with the new version of SAP BTP SDK for Android – 24.8.0. For details, please check the important links section.

  • Support for Android Studio Koala and Jellyfish
  • Use IAS Security Setting in Wizard Generated Application
  • Enhancements to OData Library
  • New Fiori Horizon Controls on Jetpack Compose and XML based Views

 

Important Links

  • SAP BTP SDK for Android 24.8.0 (Software Center)
  • Documentation
  • API Reference

 

Acknowledgement
A huge kudos to the spectacular team that worked tirelessly, right from conceptualizing the improvements, to defining, designing, building, and eventually delivering them.

entry.title: How to create package for ODN
entry.content:
Hello all,

In our S/4HANA Public Cloud TDD environment, I am trying to complete the prerequisites for Official Document Numbering described here: Prerequisite for Setting Rules for Official Document Numbers | SAP Help Portal

In order to complete step 1 in the development tenant (080), I have assigned myself the SAP_BR_DEVELOPER role with "Write access", installed Eclipse and ABAP Development Tools. I then connected to tenant and want to create a package.

I right-click on the tenant and create a new ABAP Package:

I then get to the next step and I'm not sure which software component and transport to use. (SAP is not usable, and SGIT lets me continue, but then doesn't let me continue in the next step)

Here's what I get after selecting SGIT and trying to create a new transport request:

Could somebody please indicate the correct process to create such a package in a TDD environment? Maybe there's some documentation existing that I haven't seen and you could link to?

Thanks in advance,

Joerg.

entry.title: Re: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content: For ADT, you can only use the same version of Eclipse. You have to install new version of Eclipse for new version of ADT and they need to be same version.

entry.title: Re: Generate video with sound
entry.content:
Hi Roumiana,

It's definitely possible to generate the audio using the Simulation Video option but I have seen issues with other customers previously.  My suggestion is to change the settings used to generate the audio and see if that works.  The settings that I current use that work are:

 The Use Screen Capture (Faster), Video Codec and Audio Format settings are the main ones to consider.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP: How to add query parameters to S/4 backend call
entry.content: what's the version of your system? I didn't find that class in my s4 2022/2023

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer sh...
entry.content: Thank you!

entry.title: Re: BW/4HANA Cockpit - process-chain-monitor no longer sh...
entry.content: Hint to "SMDAEMON" has helped a lot 🙂

entry.title: Has anyone successfully sent the custom headers in http adapter
entry.content: I am trying to send the custom headers like apikey in the http adapter in the integration suite and it does not seem to work and it does not take it when posting it to the ariba API.

entry.title: Re: Has anyone successfully sent the custom headers in ht...
entry.content:
Hello Padma. 

For sending custom headers via a receiver HTTP adapter, the header must be declared in the Request Headers section of receiver HTTP adapter. Assuming you have a custom header named - "apikey", it must be done as below.

Alternatively, you can also use * to send all the request headers to target receiver system.

SAP Help Link - https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/http-receiver-adapter

entry.title: Re: Types of Maintenance Plans
entry.content:
Hi, shruthi_j_b, so useful this information, thanks so much.

We have a doubt with Recurring service with Advance execution.

We use the App Add strategy-controlled plan so as to create a mantainance plan for Mant.type category SM (Service order with advanced execution) with a created stategy, but when we try to create the plan with the equipment, task list, service contract, service order type and so on, the system shows an error 

"Enter a valid service order type".

We need to know that if the process that we think is the correct.

By means of create this mantainance plan with equipment, service contract and so on, the system create a service orden and a mantainance order, service order to bill to customer and mantainance order to notify the labour hours and consume spare parts.

Although we need documents to clarify this process.

Thanks so much for your collaboration.

Fernando

entry.title: Re: SAP GR to SAC/PaPM/COPA or vice versa possible?
entry.content:
For SAC Planning integration with GR, please refer to the following link https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-integrate-sap-analytics-cloud-for-planning-with-sap-s-4hana-for/ba-p/13531170

Generally, you need to explore GR API. There are couple for both loading data into ACDOCU as well retrieve consolidated data from ACDOCU

entry.title: Accounting Doc Header: Reference procedure (BKPF-AWTYP) Values Meaning
entry.content:
Hello Team,

In accounting document, we have a field for (Ref. Transactn: BKPF-AWTYP). 

I am working on requirement and I can see values updated as RMRP; ZINV; BKPF; BKPFF.

Is there any documentation or Glossary where I can refer meaning for each of these values updated. 

Example: BKPFF - Posted with certain flow, while RMRP - Posted with some other flow? 

Thanks you

entry.title: Re: Send email when Inbound IDOC fails
entry.content: Thanks for your answer, I will investigate more tomorrow whilst in the Q system

entry.title: Re: Calling Integration Suite ODATA APIs from ODATA Receiver
entry.content:
Hi Sean,

There were few community iflows that were recently published which actually use a lot of these Integration Suite APIs. OData receiver adapter is used along with OAUTH2 credentials. This data is later used for generating alerts via ANS. The first part of extraction of data from Integration Suite is pretty much exactly what you are trying to achieve. May be have a look at these iflows and try to a



Configuration Guide - https://github.com/SAP/apibusinesshub-integration-recipes/blob/master/Recipes/for/integrationsuitealertingframeworkusingalertnotificationservice/BTPAlertingFrameworkDocumentation.pdf

Reference - https://github.com/SAP/apibusinesshub-integration-recipes/tree/master/Recipes/for/integrationsuitealertingframeworkusingalertnotificationservice

entry.title: Re: I would like to know data creation for this api "FAA_...
entry.content:
Dear Poe,

 

How are you providing ID to the API? 

See this blog, the API is different but the set up in general is the same. 
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/user-guide-for-journal-entry-post-api-on-s-4-hana-cloud/ba-p/13424193

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Smarter Supply Chains: A Generative AI Use Case powered by the SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
entry.content:
Introduction:

In my previous blog, I shared an example of how the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine and generative AI hub were utilized in an SAP Partner solution to achieve AI-driven innovation in the energy procurement domain. This was just the beginning of a series, where we explore how different partners are harnessing SAP’s advanced technologies to drive innovation. Today, we continue this journey by looking into one of Deloitte’s pioneering AI use cases, developed in collaboration with SAP’s BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program. Deloitte has implemented the GenAI Supply Chain Planning Assistant solution - demonstrating the impressive capabilities of the SAP HANA vector engine within SAP’s technology stack.

Use Case: Gen AI Supply Chain Planning Assistant

Problem Statement:

Supply chains are dynamically complex, businesses must mitigate disruptions to operational efficiency by effectively managing exceptions and minimizing inventory discrepancies. Inventory shortages and the inability to fill customer orders can lead to financial losses. The root cause is often the lack of timely access to essential information, which causes delays and suboptimal decision-making. This leaves supply chain planners struggling to identify issues and make informed decisions swiftly. Exception handling becomes particularly difficult when unexpected problems arise, such as stock-outs despite having sufficient inventory aligned with replenishment plans. Organizations cannot afford to overlook these supply chain issues and their underlying causes. Without comprehensive visibility into the end-to-end supply chain, the entire company is affected.

Solution:

Deloitte describes the Gen AI Supply Chain Planning Assistant as a tool that enables supply chain planners to efficiently manage exceptions, optimize inventory, and identify the root causes of disruptions. By leveraging AI-informed decision-making, the assistant aims to help save time and money while enhancing overall productivity.

This tool provides a macro-level dashboard that gives an overview of the entire network, pinpointing exceptions that need immediate attention. It highlights issues such as unexpected stock-outs despite having sufficient inventory levels aligned with replenishment plans

The assistant responds in near real-time, presenting insights and visualizations to help resolve the issue. For example, it might reveal that while forecasts and safety stock levels were correctly established and purchase orders generated on time, a failure occurred because the supplier did not ship according to the agreed timelines. This rapid, AI-driven feedback allows planners to address and resolve exceptions promptly, maintaining the smooth flow of the supply chain and minimizing potential disruptions.

This use case depends on the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine to enable key functionalities like:

  • Embedding Business Knowledge into Vectors: To analyze and consolidate data from unstructured sources, like vendor communications that impact delivery or emails between sales and demand planners. Additionally, the tool can extract insights and assist in root cause analysis by reading vendor agreements or contract PDF documents.
  • Embedding Technical Knowledge into Vectors: This improves the accuracy and performance of business query responses within the AI Assistant chatbot by embedding successful and accurateInterestingly, for new business queries, the chatbot first triggers a similarity search in the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine (before invoking the LLM) to retrieve context from the previously generated or executed highly similar SQL queries. The reference to previously generated SQL queries maintains the consistency & accuracy of the response.

Furthermore, the solution utilizes generative AI hub to access Azure OpenAI’s GPT foundation models to facilitate prompt engineering, perform RAG workflow, predict inventory levels, and identify potential disruptions.

Reference Architecture:

 

Value add of SAP HANA Cloud vector engine in this use case:

  1. Unified Database: Allows consolidation of data from diverse sources into a single database (vector data can be now stored alongside other structured business data), enabling the development of innovative inventory management applications.
    • Vectorization of supply chain vendor communications (emails), contracts (PDFs), and demand forecasts (Excel) enhances inventory management by capturing context, extracting critical terms, and facilitating accurate demand predictions.
  2. Optimized Query Handling:
    • Stores SQL queries for successful prompts.
    • Retrieves stored SQLs for identical prompts in future queries.
    • Uses similarity search to find and adjust the nearest SQL query as per the given prompt.
  3. Reduced Latency and Cost: By minimizing interactions with the LLM model, it reduces latency and operational costs.
  4. Improved User Experience:
    • Provides enhanced search capabilities.
    • Offers personalized recommendations, making the application more valuable and user-friendly.

Conclusion:

In exploring Deloitte’s Gen AI use case, we see how the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine plays a critical role in advancing supply chain planning by providing a robust foundation for AI-driven insights and decision-making. This use case also highlights the power of SAP's BTP to solve complex business challenges.

Be sure to look for my next blog post, where I will highlight another exciting use case from the SAP BTP Gen AI Lighthouse Program. We will dive into how another partner leverages AI and advanced technologies to drive innovation and efficiency.

Note: This blog is a collaborative effort between SAP HANA Cloud Product Management and Deloitte, highlighting the innovative use case enabled by the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine. For those interested in implementation details of this solution, Navjot Sharma (nasharma@deloitte.com) and Nipun Pratap Singh (nipsingh@deloitte.com) from Deloitte are available as the primary contacts.

Next Steps:

  1. Get a hands-on with SAP Developer’s Code Jam with SAP HANA Cloud vector engine & generative AI hub
  2. Intelligent Data Apps Are the Future: Read through this e-book to learn why
  3. Listen to the podcast on Journey to Intelligent Data Applications: Modernize with SAP HANA Cloud
  4. Get a sneak peak into the use cases our partners are building through the SAP BTP Lighthouse Program

entry.title: Re: Adding a tab in manage cost center app using UI Adapt...
entry.content:
Dear Jagadhatri,

Please make sure you have unrestricted access in a Business Role containing the Business Catalog SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_FLEX.

If so, you might want to open an incident for SAP Support to check this error message.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Customized Mail Alerts in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
In Datasphere, Use SQL Scripts or Data Flows to Calculate Record Counts.

Datasphere does not support injecting dynamic data (like record counts) directly into an email body. You have to create an external API or cloud function that formats and sends emails. In your Task Chain, after calculating the record counts, call this external API with the record counts as parameters. The external service can then format the email with the record counts and send it to the intended recipients.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning path for a candidate with technical deve...
entry.content: Thank you. How is the transition working out for you?

entry.title: Re: Visual Studio 2022 | Crystal Reports Designer only sh...
entry.content: I had the same problem. I found that I intalled CR when VS where open. I close VS. Remove CR and reinstalled it again.

entry.title: Re: SAP Learning path for a candidate with technical deve...
entry.content: Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Extract Variable policy in SAP APIM - extracting clie...
entry.content:
Hello Sneha, 
Please update the code for Extract Variable Policy as below and you should be able to extract the variable values as required.

 

<ExtractVariables async="false" continueOnError="false" enabled="true" xmlns='http://www.sap.com/apimgmt'>
    <Source>request</Source>
    <Header name="client_id">
        <Pattern ignoreCase="true">{clientid}</Pattern>
    </Header>
    <Header name="client_secret">
        <Pattern ignoreCase="true">{clientsecret}</Pattern>
    </Header>
</ExtractVariables>

entry.title: Re: Barcode Scanning function using ABAP
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SAP does offer a control with SAPUI5 for barcode/QR scanning, see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ndc.BarcodeScanner.  There are samples in the SAPUI5 Demo Kit, see https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ndc.BarcodeScannerButton. 

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Custom field can't be save in table
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

 

I'm not sure if I understood exactly where the process is failing...

Are you not able to add the custom field? or edit it?

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: Using AMDP in CDS and Some Useful Functions
entry.content: -DELETED-

entry.title: Re: Multi Level BOM Explosion using CDS + Table Function
entry.content: Good one Tarun.

entry.title: Connecting app with SAP Emarsys
entry.content:
I have a wishlist app that send e-mails and the app has 2 types of integration: Javascript SDK and REST APIs. I would like to connect the app with Emarsys, how can I do that?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Connecting app with SAP Emarsys
entry.content:
From the standard available integrations, this is not currently available: SAP Emarsys Help - Strategic Platform Integrations 

However, if your system has an API available, it may be possible to send data to this external system using the Webhooks: SAP Emarsys Help - Nodes: Webhook node 

I suggest you to try using the webhook for your usage and checking if it will fulfill your business needs. Otherwise, kindly check with your CSM about the possibility of using custom development to this scenario. Please be aware that this is a paid service and it is not guaranteed that your scenario can be developed.

Lastly, an alternative is to submit your feature request through SAP Influence so that the feature could be evaluated by product management and possibly implemented in future releases. Please refer to KBA 3367696 - Enhancement Request Process for SAP Emarsys Using the Customer Influence Platform.

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: Thank you very much for your quick reply. So the SDK update did work, I was seeing the message for other build types like Internal testing, Closed testing etc. I found this link - https://stackoverflow.com/questions/50626453/cannot-remove-internal-test-track-build-from-google-play-console - on stackoverflow, if you go down to comment 13, you will see the fix i used to get rid of most of those SDK messages. Hope this helps. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Google - Aug 30 2024 - deadline for API level 34 or higher
entry.content: This is resolved. Thanks

entry.title: Re: A Beginner's demo for pushing data from SAP CPI to SOLACE
entry.content:
Hi Rohini. Thank you for the blog. I have a question. Where did you download the SDA file? The download link doesn't work for me.

https://solace.com/integration-hub/sap-integration-suite/

entry.title: Re: Error updating ADT in Eclipse 2023-09
entry.content: You should always install the same version of ABAP/BW tools as of Eclipse, I installed Eclipse 2024-06

entry.title: Re: Accounting Doc Header: Reference procedure (BKPF-AWTY...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check Table：TTYP

entry.title: SAP IBP Analytics Stories Calculated Measure not returning expected results
entry.content:
Hi community members,

I have created a calculated measure in SAP IBP's Embedded SAC (Analytics Stories) as screenshot below.

I was expecting the "Forecast Changes" calculated measure to return the difference between "Latest Forecast" and "Forecast Snapshots". However it was returning expected results in only one month (green rectangle) and nothing in the other months (red rectangles).

Both key figures in the calculation are stored key figure with aggregation mode of sum and therefore are believed to be able to derive calculation results of a subtraction.

Any insights are greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content: Please help to close the question since it's not in the correct place.

entry.title: Screen field value wasn't passed into search help import parameter
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

For the following material batch search help, I can't get material number (MATNR), which was input in the screen, in the search help function exit. What could be reason of the issue? 

Field MATNR and CHARG (batch) are in the same screen structure.

Regards,

Eric

entry.title: Re: Issue missing home page for a specific persona in the...
entry.content: Hello, The note is valid for SPS02 & above and is the reason it is not applicable for your system. May be you can apply the latest TCI note for MOB-APP-MAO-FND component so that you can get all updates along with features & fixes. Please refer to the blog and apply relevant TCI notes into your system. https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/upgrade-mobile-application-integration-framework-maif-using-sap-note/ba-p/13535870

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: Enabling Multiple Selection on Variable (Prompt) Screen
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I need help enabling multiple selections on SAP Datasphere's prompt screen at the analytical model level. Currently, we can only make a single selection.

We need users to be able to select multiple years, such as 2023 and 2024, as well as ACT and PLN planning categories, so they can compare the two periods.

I've included screenshots showing the current expression in the filter and the prompt screens. Please advise. Thank you. SAP Datasphere

entry.title: HANA XSA Odata setup for consuming the XSA Calculation views
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My team is trying to set up "HANA XSA Odata for consuming the XSA Calculation views",

We are trying to do the same in the Webide. This API will be consumed by the middleware team for B2B consumption.

Please point me step by step on how to XSA Odata in Webide.

 

Thanks,

Shanthi

entry.title: How to archive historical data in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

 

As we prepare for the year-end, we need to archive data from 2022. There are approximately 300 million records that require archiving to make space for the new financial year. Does anyone know how to accomplish this within SAP Datasphere?

 

SAP Datasphere
